Name: Thunderdream
Date: 2024-04-02
Type: Album

Track List:
1 - Entering
2 - Thunderstorm
3 - Reality Check
4 - Lucid
5 - Full Control
6 - Moon BolLson
7 - Dream Walker
8 - Sleep Walking
9 - Nightmare
10 - Leaving


Info:
This is the first album I made using the "i6340" name.
I started making it in mid-late January 2024 and finished it in April.

I don't think this album is good but I'm putting it here so that it's archived.
